actions.name: Eject Button
actions.description:
Trigger: The user is hit by an attack.

Effect: The user may freely move up to half the maximum of a movement type of their choosing from the source of the attack. If the user is an owned creature, they may immediately recall themselves as a free action, and the owner may send out a new creature in their place.
